about_title: AI Workflow OS: device-native software creation operating layer
about: AI Workflow OS is a local-first software creation operating layer designed to turn a phone into a disciplined build workstation. Section 1 documents the same operating principle from a different angle: every visible action must map to a local endpoint, every generated artifact must be inspectable, every generated app must inherit a shell, and every proof must be repeatable from the terminal without leaking secrets or pretending that broad permissions are safe.

AI Workflow OS is a local-first software creation operating layer designed to turn a phone into a disciplined build workstation. Section 2 documents the same operating principle from a different angle: every visible action must map to a local endpoint, every generated artifact must be inspectable, every generated app must inherit a shell, and every proof must be repeatable from the terminal without leaking secrets or pretending that broad permissions are safe.

AI Workflow OS is a local-first software creation operating layer designed to turn a phone into a disciplined build workstation. privacy: Privacy principle 1: local-first means the browser interface talks to localhost endpoints and does not load remote runtime assets. Secrets are not printed, token-in-URL flows are rejected, generated proof packets avoid credential material, and every future network integration must be explicit, documented, scoped, and separately proven before it becomes part of the operator surface.

Privacy principle 2: local-first means the browser interface talks to localhost endpoints and does not load remote runtime assets. Secrets are not printed, token-in-URL flows are rejected, generated proof packets avoid credential material, and every future network integration must be explicit, documented, scoped, and separately proven before it becomes part of the operator surface.

Privacy principle 3: local-first means the browser interface talks to localhost endpoints and does not load remote runtime assets.
